text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text: Oh, Rickey... You remembered it's today.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Of course! I wanted to share some advice on
extracting the most happiness out of your
birthday...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: But, actually, let's put that stuff on hold this time!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
That's right, no feng shui—just a present I got
simply because it made me think of you. Here!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Wha?! N-no, this isn't it! Why do I even have
something like this on me?!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Huuuh?! ...Sorry, I think I forgot it in my
room.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
It's a hat I thought would look great on you... I
was going to go "ta-dah!" and make you really
happy. I can't believe this!

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text: Hehehe! You don't have to worry about that.

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
Just thinking about how you did that for me,
well... it makes me really happy already.
